hero.h1: A dentist you'll trust from your very first visit
hero.sub: From implants to aesthetic treatment — we work with our own laboratory and equipment that lets us do things properly. Now accepting new patients.
hero.support: Reception is available every working day.

team.label: Your team
team.title: The people who will take care of you

items.q: I've had a bad experience at the dentist. How will it be this time?
items.a: We understand and take it seriously. That's why we work under a microscope, with precision and in a calm environment that gives you space too. And if the fear is too great, we have nitrous oxide.

items.q: I'm not sure I can afford it. How do I find out the price?
items.a: At the first consultation you'll receive a specific treatment plan with a clear price — before you decide. No commitments upfront.

items.q: I've been looking for a dentist for a long time and nobody will take me. Can I try with you?
items.a: Yes, new patients are welcome here. Just call +420 602 195 413 — reception is available every working day from 8:00 to 16:00.

items.q: Which insurance companies do you accept?
items.a: We have contracts with VZP (111), ČPZP (205), OZP (207), VoZP (201) and ZPMV (211). Non-standard procedures such as implants, aesthetics or whitening are paid directly — we will tell you the price in advance after consultation.

cta.title: Call us. We'll handle the rest.
cta.sub: Reception will help you find an appointment and answer basic questions before your visit.
steps: You call — reception is available all working day.
An appointment that suits you is arranged.
On the day, the doctor explains everything and proposes a treatment plan.

meta.title: Services — Dentiyak dental clinic
meta.description: Overview of Dentiyak clinic services: implants, PRF therapy, aesthetic dentistry, dental hygiene, nitrous oxide, oral surgery, paediatric dentistry and more.

header.sub: Every treatment starts with a consultation and a plan — you know in advance what to expect, what it will cost and why we do it this way.

cta.title: Need advice on where to start?
cta.sub: Call us — reception will help you find an appointment and answer basic questions before your visit.

services.title: Implants
paragraphs: A missing tooth doesn't have to mean a compromise. A dental implant is a titanium root inserted into the jaw, onto which a crown is placed — visually and functionally indistinguishable from your own tooth.

We plan implants based on a 3D X-ray that shows us the exact bone structure. Prosthetic work — crowns, bridges and full dentures — is made in our own laboratory. This means we control quality from start to finish and shorten the waiting time.
For surgical procedures we use PRF therapy, which uses the patient's own blood to support natural tissue healing.
services.note: The price of an implant is determined individually after consultation.
services.cta: Call us — we'll discuss what you need

services.title: PRF therapy — healing from your own blood
services.intro: PRF is an autologous regenerative method that uses the patient's own blood. From a small blood draw, centrifugation yields a concentrate containing growth factors and bioactive molecules. This is applied directly to the treatment site, where it supports natural healing processes, collagen formation and cell renewal.
services.listHeading: In dentistry we use PRF for:
services.additionalUse: Other areas of use: aesthetic medicine (improving skin quality, reducing fine lines, skin elasticity, post-procedure recovery, scar appearance), hair growth support (androgenetic alopecia, diffuse hair loss) and musculoskeletal system (osteoarthritis, joint pain, tendinopathy).
services.safety: Safety: PRF uses exclusively the patient's own biological material — the risk of allergic reaction is minimal and biological compatibility is high. Treatment takes approximately 30–60 minutes.
services.note: The suitability of PRF therapy is determined by the doctor after consultation.

services.title: Aesthetic dentistry
paragraphs: Veneers, crowns, composite adjustments or full smile reconstructions — aesthetic treatment with us is based on precise diagnosis with an intraoral scanner and work in our own laboratory.
We plan every procedure so the result looks natural. We don't make "Hollywood smiles" on demand — we make teeth that fit your face and last.

services.title: Dental hygiene
paragraphs: Regular professional hygiene extends the life of fillings, crowns and implants. It removes tartar and staining that you can't manage with home care.
The hygienist will also show you how to care for your teeth at home — the right brushing technique, interdental brushes, floss. Prevention is always cheaper than treatment.

services.title: Treatment with nitrous oxide
paragraphs: If you're afraid of treatment, you don't need to be ashamed — and you don't need to keep putting off your dentist visit because of it.

Nitrous oxide is inhaled through a nasal mask during treatment. It induces a state of relaxation and reduces the perception of unpleasant stimuli. The patient remains conscious, breathes on their own and the effect wears off quickly after treatment.
We offer nitrous oxide for adults and children. It is a safe way to get through treatment comfortably.

services.title: Conservative dentistry
paragraphs: Fillings, root canal treatment, treatment of tooth decay — the basis of why you go to the dentist. We work under a microscope that allows us to see details invisible to the naked eye. This means more precise work, smaller interventions and better results.
We choose materials for fillings and restorations based on the specific situation — always with regard to durability and aesthetics.

services.title: Surgical procedures
paragraphs: Wisdom tooth extractions, surgical extraction of impacted teeth, root apex resections and other surgical procedures in the oral cavity.

For surgical procedures we routinely use PRF therapy — a concentrate from the patient's own blood that supports healing and reduces the risk of post-operative complications. Procedures are planned on the basis of a 3D X-ray.

services.title: Children's dentistry
paragraphs: A child patient needs a different approach than an adult — more time, more patience and an environment where they won't be afraid.

We treat children from their first milk teeth. We teach them that the dentist is nothing to be afraid of. For the youngest or anxious patients we offer treatment with nitrous oxide, which helps manage fear without general anaesthesia.
services.cta: Book your child for a check-up

services.title: Teeth whitening
paragraphs: Professional in-office whitening is safer and more effective than home kits from the drugstore. The result is visible but natural — it's not about porcelain white, but about your own shade without staining and discolouration.
Before whitening we recommend having a dental hygiene appointment — a clean tooth surface responds to whitening better.

services.title: TMJ and joint treatment
paragraphs: Jaw joint pain, clicking when opening the mouth, headaches originating in the jaw — these are problems that patients often ignore for a long time or try to resolve with other specialists.

We diagnose the cause of the difficulties and propose treatment — from occlusal splints to PRF therapy, which for joint and musculoskeletal problems (osteoarthritis, joint pain, tendinopathy) supports natural tissue regeneration.

services.title: Orthodontics
paragraphs: Braces and bite correction are provided in cooperation with an external orthodontist. If you need an assessment of whether orthodontic treatment is appropriate, start with a consultation here — based on the examination we will refer you to the specialist we have a long-term working relationship with.

meta.title: About us — Dentiyak dental clinic
meta.description: Meet the team at Dentiyak clinic in České Budějovice. Own laboratory, 3D X-ray, microscope, PRF therapy. MDDr. Nina Štěrbáková.

header.sub: We are a dental clinic where they have time for you. We work with equipment that lets us be precise, and with an approach that lets you be at ease.

paragraphs: Dentiyak is a clinic built on a simple principle — do things properly and take the time for them. We don't chase patient numbers. Every treatment starts with a consultation where we go through what's needed together and propose a treatment plan with a clear price.

We have our own dental laboratory — crowns, bridges and prosthetic work are made in-house. That means shorter waiting times, direct communication with the technician and quality control from start to finish.

We work with a 3D X-ray, surgical microscope and intraoral scanner. We use PRF therapy — a regenerative method using the patient's own blood that supports healing after surgical procedures. And for patients who are anxious about treatment, we offer nitrous oxide.

team.label: Your team
team.title: The people who will take care of you
team.sub: Photos and biographies to follow after the photo shoot.

cards.title: 3D X-ray (CBCT)
cards.text: A three-dimensional image showing bone structure, the position of nerves and roots. The basis for planning implants and surgical procedures.

cards.title: Surgical microscope
cards.text: Magnification that allows you to see details invisible to the naked eye. More precise work, smaller interventions.

cards.title: Intraoral scanner
cards.text: Digital dental impression without unpleasant impression material. More precise, faster, more comfortable.

cards.title: Own laboratory
cards.text: Crowns, bridges and prosthetic work made on-site — direct quality control, shorter waiting times.

cards.title: PRF centrifuge
cards.text: Preparation of a concentrate from the patient's own blood to support natural healing after procedures.

insurance.text: For procedures covered by insurance you pay nothing. Non-standard treatment (implants, aesthetics, whitening, hygiene) is paid directly — we will tell you the price in advance after consultation.

cta.title: Would you like to meet us in person?
cta.sub: Call us — we'll arrange a first consultation where we go through what you need and propose a plan.

meta.title: Contact — Dentiyak dental clinic
meta.description: Contact Dentiyak clinic in České Budějovice. Phone +420 602 195 413, Krajinská 251/16. Mon–Fri 8:00–16:00. Accepting new patients.

header.sub: You can arrange everything with one phone call. Reception is available every working day.

paragraphs: Is this your first visit? You don't need to prepare anything — just call.

Reception will ask for your name, phone number, insurance company and what you need to address. At the first visit the doctor will examine you, discuss your situation and propose a treatment plan with a price. No commitments — you decide once you have all the information.
New patients are welcome here.
